entity.name: product
entity.query: SELECT p.id, p.sku, p.upc, p.name AS product_name, p.description, p.short_description, p.price_amount, p.price_currency, p.sale_price, p.in_stock, p.stock_quantity, p.priority, p.avg_rating, p.review_count, b.name AS brand, p.store_lat, p.store_lon, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM products p LEFT JOIN brands b ON p.brand_id = b.id WHERE p.is_active = 1
entity.deltaImportQuery: SELECT p.id, p.sku, p.upc, p.name AS product_name, p.description, p.short_description, p.price_amount, p.price_currency, p.sale_price, p.in_stock, p.stock_quantity, p.priority, p.avg_rating, p.review_count, b.name AS brand, p.store_lat, p.store_lon, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM products p LEFT JOIN brands b ON p.brand_id = b.id WHERE p.id = '${dataimporter.delta.id}'
entity.deltaQuery: SELECT id FROM products WHERE updated_at > '${dataimporter.last_index_time}'
entity.deletedPkQuery: SELECT id FROM products WHERE is_active = 0 AND updated_at > '${dataimporter.last_index_time}'

entity.name: categories
entity.query: SELECT c.name AS category, c.path AS category_path FROM product_categories pc JOIN categories c ON pc.category_id = c.id WHERE pc.product_id = '${product.id}' ORDER BY c.depth ASC

entity.name: tags
entity.query: SELECT t.name AS tag FROM product_tags pt JOIN tags t ON pt.tag_id = t.id WHERE pt.product_id = '${product.id}'

entity.name: reviews
entity.query: SELECT r.text AS review_text, r.rating AS review_rating, r.author AS review_author, r.created_at AS review_date FROM reviews r WHERE r.product_id = '${product.id}' AND r.is_approved = 1 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 50
